narrative:
Fairborn 201 (precinct in Greene County) has 830 registered voters, with 62.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.8%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.9 percentage points.
